text: Bitcoin is holding steady near $60K while Ethereum edges fractionally higher, suggesting neither major is under immediate selling pressure despite extreme fear sentiment. The Fear & Greed index at 18 with worsening conditions over the past week indicates capitulation-level sentiment, though relatively modest volume of $43B and Bitcoin's dominant 55.9% market share suggest conviction in either direction remains thin. Altcoins like BNB are trailing, typical of risk-off environments where capital gravitates toward the largest names.
